tasks.label: Jarvis: G1 Doctor
tasks.detail: Workspace and command-layer sanity report.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G2 Fast Validate
tasks.detail: Fast local preflight before a larger verify or deploy step.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G3 Targeted Verify
tasks.detail: Run the pre-deploy gate plus focused checks for selected files.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G3.5 PQ Strict Gate
tasks.detail: Fail fast unless SSH to NAS negotiates PQ-capable KEX.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G4 Smart Deploy
tasks.detail: Preferred deploy path. Auto-selects the safest deploy tier.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G5 Confidence
tasks.detail: Post-deploy smoke checks and reality snapshot on the NAS.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G5.5 CI Pipeline Strict
tasks.detail: Strictly verify latest pipeline-contract run and include job conclusions.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Status
tasks.detail: Show the current Jarvis service status on the NAS.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Logs Ingestion
tasks.detail: Show ingestion logs from the NAS service.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Restart Ingestion
tasks.detail: Restart the ingestion service on the NAS.

tasks.label: Jarvis: PQ Upgrade Preflight
tasks.detail: Capture NAS SSH/package baseline before PQ upgrade work.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Preflight (G1+G2)
tasks.detail: Standard preflight: Doctor check + Fast Validate. Use for normal changes.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Risk Preflight (G1+G2+G3)
tasks.detail: Risk-aware preflight for auth/state/database/security changes.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Deploy (G1+G2+G4)
tasks.detail: Standard deploy path: Doctor + Validate + Smart Deploy.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Deploy PQ-Gated (G1+G2+PQ+G4+G5)
tasks.detail: Deploy path with strict PQ handshake gate before smart deploy.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Full Deploy (G1+G2+G4+G5)
tasks.detail: Full deploy with confidence checks: Doctor + Validate + Deploy + Smoke.

tasks.label: Jarvis: G6 Safety Parallel
tasks.detail: Run guardrails and sandbox safety probes in parallel.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Safety + Confidence (G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Run the parallel safety probe and confidence checks together.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Observe + Safety + Confidence (Status||G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Run status observation alongside safety and confidence checks.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Readiness Gate (G1+G2->G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Run preflight first, then execute safety and confidence in parallel.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Risk Readiness (G1+G2+G3->Status||G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Run risk preflight first, then execute status, safety, and confidence in parallel.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Full Readiness (G1+G2+G4->Status||G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Deploy first, then run status, safety, and confidence in parallel.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Full Readiness + CI Gate (G1+G2+G4->Status||G6||G5->CI)
tasks.detail: Run full readiness first, then strict latest pipeline-contract verification with job details.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Risk Deploy + Parallel (G1+G2+G3->G4->Status||G6||G5)
tasks.detail: Risk-ready preflight, deploy, then parallel observation. Most rigorous CI/CD path.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Docs Cleanup (preflight + gate)
tasks.detail: Check and repair documentation: frontmatter, invalid domains, duplicates.

tasks.label: Jarvis: Full CI/CD Parallel (Full Readiness || Risk Deploy || Docs)
tasks.detail: Master orchestration: run Full Readiness, Risk Deploy, and Docs Cleanup all in parallel.

inputs.description: Space-separated target files for focused verification. Leave blank for the generic gate path.
